scopeSummary: Build the Foundation personal-agent onboarding contract/proof: private profile schema, privacy tiers, first useful source-backed read, calibration interview, daily nugget rules, feedback/non-response loop, read-only source lookups, and update rules. notApproved: Do not build Harlan UI or feature work.

Do not send Gmail, ClickUp, Drive, Slack, Telegram, or Agent Feedback mutations.

Do not work MEETING-VAULT-ACL-001 Phase B or historical Meeting Vault cleanup.

Do not copy raw private profile values into repo truth.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
